free_text: Fusion cross sections for 7Li + 12C system at near
surface barrier (SSB) detectors were placed on one
of the movable arms inside a 1 m diameter scattering
chamber. The detector thicknesses were typically
10-25 mu-m for dE and 250-300 mu-m for E. A monitor
(single SSB of thickness 2000 mu-m) detector was
mounted on the other arm at 20 degr. with respect to
the beam direction for monitoring the beam quality
and the variation in the target thickness when the
at Elab = 7.5 MeV from the FOTIA (Folded
Tandem Ion Accelerator) at BARC and
and 15 MeV, from the 14UD BARC-TIFR Pelletron
Target thickness ~52 mu-g/cm2 s for 7.5, 9 and 15 MeV,
Entry compiled and approved by author
distribution plus sys. err. in stat. model parameter
